{{Quote|I am versed in all the necessary particulars of this case and Selkath law, offworlder.|Bwa'lass to [[Revan/Legends|Revan]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''</ref>}}
'''Bwa'lass''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Selkath/Legends|Selkath]] who lived in [[Ahto City]] during the time of the [[Jedi Civil War]]. Serving as an [[Arbiter/Legends|Arbiter]], he was appointed by the [[Ahto High Court]] for various cases.

==Biography==
Bwa'lass was appointed to represent [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] as a result of his attack on the [[Sith Embassy]] while searching for [[Manaan/Legends|Manaan's]] hidden [[Star Map]]. Seeing that Bwa'lass was not competent in his questioning, Revan chose to represent himself.

==Behind the scenes==
If Revan allows Bwa'lass to defend him without interruption, Bwa'lass will desperately turn to an insanity defense when his other strategies failed. The player will be found guilty and be executed.

If the player finds the [[Datapad/Legends|datapad]] that details the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]]'s plan to corrupt Manaan's youth and spread the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]] among those [[Selkath/Legends|Selkath]] who are [[The Force/Legends|Force-sensitive]], they can show it to Bwa'lass, who is competent enough to realize the value of the evidence. Bwa'lass does not accompany the player to the trial, so the game proceeds as if the player represents themselves.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
